narrative: Central bankers' retreat from forward guidance raises odds of policy coordination — EUR/USD at 1.1386. Warsh, Lagarde, and Bailey signal a shift away from explicit guidance; US inflation risks ease. USD/JPY at 162.54, 275bp Fed-BoJ carry differential sustains USD bid; intervention risk above 163.00. Gold near $4,031; equities -0.22%; DXY +0.21%; VIX 16.6. Watch ECB Forum on Central Banking for further cues.
